prerequisites.value: Spell Focus ( necromancy ), ability to cast summon monster.

description.value: **Benefit:** Add “ human skeleton ” to the list of creatures you can summon with summon monster I and “ human skeletal champion ” to the list of creatures you can summon with summon monster III. Once per day, when you cast summon monster, you may summon a skeletal version of one of the creatures on that spell’s summoning list (apply the skeleton template to that creature to create this monster).
